sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) with suff. עֶדְרֹו a flock, Gen 29:2, Gen 29:3, Gen 29:8, and so frequently; עֵדֶר יְהֹוָה a flock of Jehovah, a name for the people of Israel, Jer 13:17.

(2) [Eder], pr.n.-(a) of a town in the south of the tribe of Judah, Jos 15:21.-(b) m. 1Ch 23:23 24:30 compare מִגְדַּל עֵדֶר p. 447, B .
